creator: dulaithol@gmail.com
text:
I have an abit AirPace PCI-E b/g wifi card that the ath driver tries to attach to but fails to initialize with a HAL status code of 13.

pciconf -lv returns
ath0@pci3:0:0:  class=0x020000 card=0x1033147b chip=0x001c168c rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Atheros Communications Inc.'
    device     = 'AR5006 family 802.11abg Wireless NIC'
    class      = network
    subclass   = ethernet

How-To-Repeat: Try to use the card noted above
